# HotZarina

> HotZarina (hotzarina.in) is India's premium escort and spa directory — connecting users with verified female escorts, spa services, and male escorts across 300+ locations in India.

## About

HotZarina provides location-specific pages for escorts, spa centers, and male escort services across major Indian cities including Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Nashik, Varanasi, Patna, and hundreds more.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://hotzarina.in/
- Contact: https://hotzarina.in/contact
- Gallery: https://hotzarina.in/gallery
- Services: https://hotzarina.in/services
- Locations: https://hotzarina.in/location

## Page Types (per location)

Each location slug supports three page types:
- `/escorts-in-{slug}` — Female escorts listing page
- `/spa-center-in-{slug}` — Spa and massage services page
- `/male-escorts-in-{slug}` — Male escorts listing page

## Coverage

300+ locations across Indian cities including:
Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Surat, Nashik, Nagpur, Varanasi, Patna, Lucknow, Kanpur, Agra, Indore, Bhopal, Thane, Navi Mumbai, Gurgaon, Noida, Faridabad, Ghaziabad, Meerut, Allahabad, Vadodara, Rajkot, Ludhiana, Chandigarh, Amritsar, Vishakhapatnam, Coimbatore, Madurai, Mysore, Hubli, Mangalore, Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram and many more.

## Sitemap

Full sitemap with all 1100+ URLs: https://hotzarina.in/sitemap.xml
